interpretation: FIM tier hierarchy on ImageNet-pretrained ViT-L/16 (304M params, 79.66% top-1). Production-scale vision transformer (attention architecture). Combined with V9.5 ResNet-50 (CNN production-scale) and V9.6 GPT-2-medium (language production-scale), gives three production-scale data points across CNN + ViT + autoregressive-LM.
